words.def: having a lower than usual temperature; having a temperature lower than the human body
words.example: I'm cold. Turn the heating up.

words.def: (in the UK) a place where students go to study or to receive training after they have left school
words.example: a secretarial college

words.def: the appearance that things have that results from the way in which they reflect light. Red, orange and green are colours.
words.example: What's your favourite colour?

words.def: to move to or towards a person or place
words.example: + adv./prep., He left and said he was never coming back.

words.def: an electronic machine that can store, organize and find information, do processes with numbers and other data, and control other machines
words.example: a home computer

words.def: a public performance of music
words.example: to attend/go to a concert

words.def: an informal talk involving a small group of people or only two; the activity of talking in this way
words.example: a phone conversation

words.def: accurate or true, without any mistakes
words.example: Do you have the correct time?

words.def: used as the past tense of ‘can’
words.example: She said that she couldn't come.

words.def: a series of lessons or lectures on a particular subject
words.example: a French/chemistry course

words.def: a child of your aunt or uncle
words.example: She's my cousin.

words.def: a large animal kept on farms to produce milk or beef
words.example: to milk a cow

words.def: the customs and beliefs, art, way of life and social organization of a particular country or group
words.example: African/American/European/Islamic culture

words.def: a small container that is like a bowl in shape, usually with a handle, used for drinking tea, coffee, etc.
words.example: He filled the cup with water.

words.def: father
words.example: That's my dad over there.

words.def: a series of movements and steps that are usually performed to music; a particular example of these movements and steps
words.example: Do you know any other Latin American dances?

words.def: moving your body to music
words.example: There was music and dancing till two in the morning.

words.def: a person’s female child
words.example: We have two sons and a daughter.

words.def: a period of 24 hours
words.example: ‘What day is it today?’ ‘Monday.’

words.def: the 12th and last month of the year
words.example: She was born in December.

words.def: having a very pleasant taste or smell
words.example: Who cooked this? It's absolutely delicious.

words.def: to say what somebody/something is like
words.example: describe somebody/something, The next section describes our findings in detail.

words.def: the general arrangement of the different parts of something that is made, such as a building, book, machine, etc.
words.example: The basic design of the car is very similar to that of earlier models.

words.def: a piece of furniture like a table, often with drawers (= parts like boxes in it with handles on the front for pulling them open), that you sit at to read, write, work, etc.
words.example: at a desk, I spend all day sitting at a desk.

words.def: a book or electronic resource that gives a list of the words of a language in alphabetical order and explains what they mean, or gives a word for them in a foreign language
words.example: a Spanish-English dictionary

words.def: the way in which two people or things are not like each other; the way in which somebody/something has changed
words.example: Americans and Brits speak the same language, but there are big cultural differences.

words.def: not the same as somebody/something; not like somebody/something else
words.example: different from somebody/something, American English is significantly different from British English.

words.def: not easy; needing effort or skill to do or to understand
words.example: The competition judges were given a very difficult task.

words.def: the main meal of the day, eaten either in the middle of the day or in the evening
words.example: It's time for dinner.

words.def: not clean
words.example: dirty hands/clothes/dishes

words.def: to talk about something with somebody, especially in order to decide something
words.example: discuss something with somebody, Have you discussed the problem with anyone?

words.def: a flat shallow container for cooking food in or serving it from
words.example: a baking/serving dish

words.def: used to refer to actions that you do not mention by name or do not know about
words.example: What are you doing this evening?

words.def: a person who has been trained in medical science, whose job is to treat people who are ill or injured
words.example: You'd better see a doctor about that cough.

words.def: an animal with four legs and a tail, often kept as a pet or trained for work, for example hunting or guarding buildings. There are many types of dog, some of which are wild.
words.example: I took the dog for a walk.

words.def: the unit of money in the US, Canada, Australia and several other countries
words.example: You will be paid in American dollars.

words.def: a piece of wood, glass, etc. that is opened and closed so that people can get in and out of a room, building, car, etc.; a similar thing in a cupboard
words.example: Open the door!

words.def: a piece of clothing that is made in one piece and hangs down to cover the body as far as the legs, sometimes reaching to below the knees, or to the ankles
words.example: a long white dress

words.def: a liquid for drinking; an amount of a liquid that you drink
words.example: Can I have a drink?

words.def: a person who drives a vehicle
words.example: a bus/train/taxi driver

words.def: a disk on which large amounts of information, especially films, photographs and video, can be stored, for use on a DVD player or computer (the abbreviation for ‘digital versatile disc’ or ‘digital videodisc’)
words.example: Let's just stay in and watch a DVD.

words.def: used to refer to every one of two or more people or things, when you are thinking about them separately
words.example: Each answer is worth 20 points.

words.def: either of the organs on the sides of the head that you hear with
words.example: the left/right ear

words.def: not difficult; done or obtained without a lot of effort or problems
words.example: an easy way to make bread

words.def: to put food in your mouth, bite it and swallow it
words.example: I was too nervous to eat.

words.def: a small oval object with a thin hard shell produced by a female bird and containing a young bird; a similar object (without a hard shell) produced by a female fish, insect, etc.
words.example: The female sits on the eggs until they hatch.
There are only eleven of these rare animals left.

words.def: in addition to something already mentioned
words.example: What else did he say?

words.def: the final part of a period of time, an event, an activity or a story
words.example: It's the end of an era.

words.def: to get pleasure from something
words.example: enjoy something, We thoroughly enjoyed our time in New York.

words.def: the part of the day between the afternoon and the time you go to bed
words.example: Remember to call me this evening.

words.def: a thing that happens, especially something important
words.example: recent/current/world events

words.def: used with singular nouns to refer to all the members of a group of things or people
words.example: She knows every student in the school.

words.def: every person; all people
words.example: Everybody knows Tom.

words.def: every person; all people
words.example: Everyone cheered and clapped.

words.def: all things
words.example: Everything had gone.

words.def: something such as an object, a fact or a situation that shows, explains or supports what you say
words.example: Let me give you an example.

words.def: feeling or showing happiness and enthusiasm
words.example: Staff got excited when they heard they were getting a bonus.

words.def: causing great interest or excitement
words.example: This is an exciting opportunity for me.

words.def: costing a lot of money
words.example: an expensive car/restaurant/holiday

words.def: either of the two organs on the face that you see with
words.example: The suspect has dark hair and green eyes.

words.def: wrong; not correct or true
words.example: A whale is a fish. True or false?

words.def: connected with the family or a particular family
words.example: family life

words.def: known about by many people
words.example: a famous artist/actor

words.def: a person who owns or manages a farm
words.example: My parents are dairy farmers.

words.def: moving or able to move quickly
words.example: a fast car/horse

words.def: a male parent of a child or an animal; a person who is acting as the father to a child
words.example: My father died in 2017.

words.def: liked more than others of the same kind
words.example: It's one of my favourite movies.

words.def: the 2nd month of the year, between January and March
words.example: She was born in February.

words.def: something that you feel through the mind or through the senses
words.example: a feeling of something, a feeling of guilt/helplessness/anger/sadness

words.def: a series of performances of music, plays, films, etc., usually organized in the same place once a year; a series of public events connected with a particular activity or idea
words.example: a film/music festival
He's in the first fifteen.
She was born in the fifties.

words.def: to make something full of something; to become full of something
words.example: fill something, Please fill this glass for me.

words.def: to discover somebody/something unexpectedly or by chance
words.example: find somebody/something, Look what I've found!
There are only five cookies left.

words.def: the surface of a room that you walk on
words.example: a wooden/concrete/tiled floor

words.def: the coloured part of a plant from which the seed or fruit develops. Flowers usually grow at the end of a stem and last only a short time.
words.example: The plant has a beautiful bright red flower.

words.def: things that people or animals eat
words.example: Pat had prepared food and drink for the work party.

words.def: a game played by two teams of 11 players, using a round ball that players kick up and down the playing field. Teams try to kick the ball into the other team’s goal.
words.example: The kids were outside playing football.

words.def: to not remember to do something that you ought to do, or to bring or buy something that you ought to bring or buy
words.example: ‘Why weren't you at the meeting?’ ‘Sorry—I forgot.’

words.def: a type or variety of something
words.example: all the millions of different life forms on the planet today

words.def: 4th
words.example: Today is the fourth (of May).

words.def: the day of the week after Thursday and before Saturday
words.example: It's Friday today, isn't it?

words.def: a person you know well and like, and who is not usually a member of your family
words.example: This is my friend Tom.

words.def: used to show where somebody/something starts
words.example: She began to walk away from him.

words.def: on or at the front of something
words.example: (British English), the front garden

words.def: the part of a plant that consists of one or more seeds and a soft inner part, can be eaten as food and usually tastes sweet
words.example: tropical fruits, such as bananas and pineapples

words.def: containing or holding as much or as many as possible; having no empty space
words.example: a full bottle of wine

words.def: making you laugh
words.example: a funny story/joke

words.def: an activity that you do to have fun, often one that has rules and that you can win or lose; the equipment for a game
words.example: The kids were playing a game with their balloons.

words.def: a piece of land next to or around your house where you can grow flowers, fruit, vegetables, etc., usually with a lawn (= an area of grass)
words.example: a front/back/rear garden

words.def: to receive something
words.example: I got a call from Dave this morning.

words.def: a female child
words.example: a little girl of six

words.def: a girl or a woman that somebody is having a romantic relationship with
words.example: He’s got a new girlfriend.

words.def: to hand something to somebody so that they can look at it, use it or keep it for a time
words.example: give something to somebody, Give the letter to your mother when you've read it.

words.def: a hard, usually clear, substance used, for example, for making windows and bottles
words.example: a sheet/pane of glass
